items.title: Roger Goodell has "about 10" more countries in mind for games, including Japan
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Ronchi to coach Renegades in the BBL, White moves to Stars
items.summary: White switches roles from Renegades to Stars while Ronchi leaves New Zealand to take a second senior franchise role and his first in the BBL
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Canberra United’s A-League Women future secured as date set for Men’s team entry
items.summary: Australian Sports Group takes over licence from Capital Football New owner has option to introduce ALM side for the 2028/29 season The future of Canberra United has been secured...
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
